notes: DJI Authorised Enterprise Dealer in Singapore offering DJI Dock 2 and DJI Dock 3 solutions from its Sin Ming Road headquarters, including 24/7 autonomous operations and vehicle-mounted deployments.
DJI's global enterprise dealer page lists Singapore among supported regions for DJI Dock and Dock 3, confirming availability via local authorised dealers such as Avetics Global.
While primarily serving Benelux, Droprise is referenced by Volarious alongside other global DJI Dock partners; included here as a regional reference but not treated as a local Singapore dealer.
